name: Alliance Credit Counseling
description_short: Alliance Credit Counseling is a credit repair provider based in Charlotte, North Carolina. Rated 4.5/5 with 96 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Alliance Credit Counseling is a credit repair provider serving clients in Charlotte, North Carolina. Carrying a 4.5/5.0 Google rating from 96 reviews, Alliance Credit Counseling has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Charlotte area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a bankruptcy service, consumer advice center, financial planner, Alliance Credit Counseling provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Charlotte, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Alliance Credit Counseling operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Charlotte, North Carolina area who are considering Alliance Credit Counseling should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
